title: Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuii leh P&E Minister Pu F Rodingliana ten Aizawl Civil Hospital leh Zoram Medical College power supply tihchangtlunna tur en
content:
878/2026-2027

Aizawl the 6th June, 2026: Vawiin khan Health & Family Welfare Minister Pi Lalrinpuii leh Power & Electricity Minister Pu F Rodingliana ten Mizorama damdawi in lian pahnih kan neih Aizawl Civil Hospital leh Zoram Medical College chu tlawhin heng damdawi in lian pahniha chhum lo chat lova power supply pekna tur leh hmalakna tur hmachhawp dangte a hmunah an en.

Aizawl Civil Hospital chawmtu tur bik dedicated power line siamna hnathawh bul tan dan tur Minister te hian an en a, ruahman dan chuan Aizawl Civil Hospital powerline hi direct in Indoor Sub-Station atanga lak tur a ni a, hemi atan hian cheng vaibelchhe 1 chuang ruahman a ni.  Power supply khaihlak thulha hospital pumpui chawm thei tur 500 kVA diesel generator dahna tur hmunte enho nghal a ni a, diesel generator leina tur hi P&E Department kutah pawisa pek tawh niin bun fel thuai tum a ni. Hmun pawimawh zual- ICU, Blood Bank, Haemodialysis Unit leh Operation Theater te chawmtu tur power back up keng tel 20 kVA Solar Plant dahna turte an en nghal bawk a ni.

Aizawl Civil Hospital an tlawh zawh hian Minister-te hian Aizawl Medical College (ZMC) tlawh lehin NESIDS(OTRI) atanga sum hmuh cheng vaibelchhe 13 leh nuai 14 senga 1.5 MW Solar Plant  dahna tur leh heta tanga kawlphetha siamchhuahte ZMC chhunga semkualna tur KM 1 a sei distribution line leh 500kVA distribution transformer thar pathum dah belh dan turte a hmunah hian an ennghal a ni. ZMC a solar plant dah tur 1.5 MW atang hian 1.2 MW hi On-Grid tur niin, .3 MW hi Hybrid Mode vuah tur a ni.

Minister-te hian kan damdawi in liante khaihlak lova 24X7 power pekna turin heng ruahmanna te hi siam a nih thu an sawi a. A bik takin hmun pawimawh zual ICU, Blood Bank, Haemodialysis Unit leh Operation Theater te chu thlur bing zual a nih tur thu sawiin reiloteah hna thawh tan a nih tur thu an sawi a ni.

Pi K Lalrinzuali, Commissioner & Secretary, P&E /H&FW bakah Er. Ngursailova Sailo Engineer-in-Chief, P&ED; Er. Laltlanthanga, CE(SO) P&ED; Prof. Zoramthara Zadeng, Director, ZMC; Prof. Lalnunmawii Sailo, Medical Superintendent, ZMC leh official dangten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: District Election Officer visits Booth Level Officers during ongoing Special Intensive Revision
content:
148/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 6th June 2026:Deputy Commissioner of Champhai and District Election Officer Mr. Mohammad Aaquib visited Booth Level Officers within Champhai town on account of the ongoing Special Intensive Revision, discussing ways forward and hearing their concerns.

Champhai DEO Mr. Mohammad Aaquib visited seven booths under 24-Champhai South Assembly Constituency - Champhai Vengthar, Tlangsam I & II, New Champhai, Zotlang I & II and Ruantlang. He also visited four booths under 23-Champhai North Assembly Constituency - Dawr Veng, Rahsi Veng, Awmpui Veng and IB Veng. He urged the BLOs, Addl. BLOs and the Booth Level Standing Committees to grasp the importance of the SIR and to work together diligently and in harmony. He also reminded them that the DEO's office is available to anyone who needs help.

The DEO was accompanied by Election Officer Mr. Ngulzathuama; Champhai South AERO Mr. Lalchhuanawma Ralte, SDC; and Ms. Zohlimpuii, SDC. The team had a fruitful interaction with the BLOs and their teams, addressing their doubts and concerns, and discussing ways to expedite the various phases of SIR while maintaining efficiency and quality.

Attachment

title: Special Intensive Revision neih mekah Champhai District Election Officer in Booth Level Officer te a tlawh
content:
877/2026-2027

Champhai, 6th June 2026:Electoral Roll ennawnna beihpui - Special Intensive Revision neih mekah vawiin khan Champhai Bawrhsap, District Election Officer (DEO) ni bawk Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan Champhai khawpui chhunga Booth Level Officer (BLO) te a tlawh a. Harsatna an neih te enfiahin, chak zawk leh tluang zawka hmalak chhoh dan te an sawiho a ni.

Champhai DEO Pu Mohammad Aaquib hian 24-Champhai South huamchhunga Booth Level Officer pasarih - Champhai Vengthar, Tlangsam - I & II, New Champhai, Zotlang I & II leh Ruantlang bakah 23-Champhai North huamchhung - Champhai Vengthlang chhunga Booth pali- Dawr Veng, Rahsi Veng, IB Veng leh Awmpui Vengte a tlawh a. Special Intensive Revision chu thil pawimawh tak anih avangin, Booth Level Officer leh anmahni puitu Addl BLO te, Booth Level Standing Committee chu thawhhona tha tak nei tur leh theihtawp chhuah turin a ngen a. Harsatna an neih te chu DEO Office a thlen hreh lo turin a chah bawk.

He hunah hian Booth Level Officer te nen inkawmhona hun tha tak neih a ni a. An harsatna te chinfel dan tur ngaihtuah pui an nih bakah huntiam chhunga an tihtur te an tih zawh ngei theih nan an hriatthiam loh te hrilhfiah nghal zel an ni bawk a ni.

District Election Officer Pu Mohammad Aaquib hi Election Officer Pu Ngulzathuama; Champhai South AERO Pu Lalchhuanawma Ralte, SDC; leh Pi Zohlimpuii, SDC ten an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Minister Pu F Rodingliana’n Industrial Estate Zuangtui a tlawh
content:
876/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 6th of June, 2026:Nimin tlai khan Commerce, Industries, Geology & Mining Minister Pu F Rodingliana’n Industrial Estate Zuangtui a tlawh a. Industry hrang hrang - Plastic Tanky industry, Handloom Industry, water bottling plant, toughened glass siamna leh Tin Roof industryte tlawhin, an hnathawhte a endik.

He hunah hian CIG&M Minister Pu F Rodingliana leh Mizoram Industries Owner’s Association hruaitute chuan meeting nei nghal in, MIOA hruaitute hian Industry hmangaihtu Minister an nei chu lawmawm an ti a. MIOA hruaitute hian Industrialist ten harsatna an tawh hrang hrangte Minister hnenah hian an thlen.

MIOA hruaitute hian Mizoram chhunga entrepreneurs ten industry dinna tur ram an hmuh zawh tawhloh thu leh, industrial area awmsa te pawh encroachers ten an tihbuai avanga harsatna an tawh thu an thlen a, hei hian Central scheme an claimna thlenga a tihbuai thu an sawi a, an buaina te chinfel sak turin an ngen.

Minister chuan industrialist te’n an harsatna an sawi te chu Sawrkarin theih tawp chhuahin a ngaihtuah mek a ni tih a sawi a. Industrial area huam chhunga diklo taka ram neite chungah khauh taka hma an lak tur thu a sawi. State tan industry a hmasawnna pawimawh zia Sawrkarin a hre chiang a, entrepreneur leh industry hmasawnna atan environment tha siam turin theihtawp an chhuah reng thu a sawi.

He hunah hian Pi Zoramchhani, Jt. Secretary, CIG&M; Pu Lalhmunsiama, Addl. Director leh Pu L.P. Lalchangkima, Managing Director, ZIDCO ten Minister hi an ṭawiawm a ni.

Attachment
